typing: Full Stack in real product environments

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I work as a Full Stack Developer at AutoU, contributing to aura-central-autou inside the appautou organization. My day-to-day work involves interfaces, APIs, integrations and internal product flows.
about.p2: My current focus is React, TypeScript, Node.js, Python and FastAPI, with strong attention to architecture, automated quality, integrations and long-term maintainability.
about.p3: Alongside professional work, I keep building personal projects around AI, automation and data visualization while studying Multiplatform Software Development at FATEC Jacareí.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
items.description: Working in a DDD-oriented monorepo across projects, CRM, recruiting, identity and performance flows. Building interfaces, APIs and integrations in a real internal product environment.
achievements: Delivered features across multiple product domains
Implemented Azure AD SSO with MSAL
Integrated Jira data for sprint and task synchronization
Built backend services with FastAPI and SQLAlchemy
Worked with automated quality using ESLint, Ruff, Bandit and Snyk

items.title: Software Development Intern
items.description: Built web applications, automations and AI solutions for real client scenarios, combining Python backends, API integrations and computer vision.
achievements: Automated workflows and integrations with n8n
Built REST APIs for data processing
Worked on YOLOv5, YOLOv8 and computer vision solutions
Delivered generative AI and machine learning features in practical contexts

items.title: Scrum Master and Developer in ABP Projects
items.description: Participated in problem-based learning projects with multidisciplinary squads, facilitating agile ceremonies and contributing across frontend and backend.
achievements: Facilitated Scrum ceremonies and backlog organization
Delivered team projects with product-oriented thinking
Worked across documentation, frontend and backend in the same cycle
